meaning: Repository mutation has been observed, but public GitHub Pages publication has not been confirmed from available connector status data.
required_distinction: Committed content is not the same as externally verified public page state.
paths_note: Paths are shown without leading dot for iOS readability. Actual workflow paths use the leading dot directory.
next_actions: Confirm a Pages workflow run is created for the latest commit.
Confirm the public page for the changed content is reachable after deployment.
Record the public URL and deployment ref after verification.
non_claims: This status file does not prove deployment failure.
This status file does not prove public visibility.
This status file records the current unverified state from available status data.
